0.name: Weekend-Surge, Lean Operations
0.description: Low daily output but waste ratio is lowest. Strong weekend demand surge (+21%). Short shelf-life products need fast turnover. Cold-start prediction: use category benchmarks + weekend adjustment.

1.name: High-Volume, Predictable Surplus
1.description: Highest daily output and absolute surplus volume. Waste ratio is highest (17.8%). Consistent, predictable surplus pattern across weekdays. Weekend spike is minimal. Cold-start prediction: category benchmark is strong prior.

2.name: Mid-Volume, Fast-Paced Perishable
2.description: Medium output and surplus. SHORTEST shelf life (16.5h) is the discriminating factor — products move fast or spoil fast. Moderate weekend surge. Cold-start prediction: shelf-life-adjusted category benchmark.
